name: quandora
description: All-in-one Quandora plugin for agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Quandora services from your agent.
interface.longDescription: Quandora packages service skills in one plugin. Factor Mining is the first skill and helps agents list tasks, create sessions, submit factor source, run backtests, retrieve artifacts, and summarize results.
defaultPrompt: Use Quandora Factor Mining to show public tasks.
Use Quandora Factor Mining with my custom factor idea.
Use Quandora Factor Mining to resume a run and summarize results.
